comment: Drop this into a project's .claude/settings.json to snapshot the raw transcript before compaction destroys it (and, on auto-compaction, nudge a checkpoint while the window is still intact). macOS/Linux uses python3 and $HOME; on Windows use python and %USERPROFILE%. matcher 'auto' fires when the token threshold triggers compaction unattended — snapshot + nudge; matcher 'manual' fires on /compact, where you chose the timing yourself — snapshot only. Snapshots land in <project>/docs/acc/_snapshots/ (gitignored, newest 5 kept). The hook is exit-0-safe: a misfire never blocks compaction.
